property.name: Description
property.value: Checking that CRC is calculated expetedly

property.name: Description
property.value: Checking that invalid packages are unpacked correctly

property.name: Description
property.value: Checking that valid packages are unpacked correctly

property.name: Description
property.value: Checking that invalid data is unpacked expectedly

property.name: Description
property.value: Checking that valid data is unpacked correctly

property.name: Description
property.value: Checking that invalid data is not packed and error is reported

property.name: Description
property.value: Checking that valid data is packed correctly

property.name: Description
property.value: Checking that valid data is send to COM port correctly

property.name: Description
property.value: Checking that valid responses are invoked by delegates

property.name: Description
property.value: Checking that valid data is send to COM port correctly
